message:
fix(interactive/tests): drop unused BubbleteaModel import

The two new Enter-handling tests for the autocomplete dropdown
imported `Model as BubbleteaModel` so they could call
`app.update(...)`, but that method is reachable through the inherent
impl on `PiApp` here — the trait import isn't actually required and
clippy was flagging it as unused.

src/interactive/tests.rs:
- Trim `Model as BubbleteaModel` from both `use bubbletea::{...}`
  lists in `enter_accepts_highlighted_autocomplete_item` and
  `enter_submits_when_no_autocomplete_item_highlighted`. Tests still
  compile and run; the assertion bodies are unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
